has_more.description: True when more replies exist beyond the returned page.

current_user_id.description: User ID of the connected account (from auth.test). Messages authored by this id are the requesting user's own. Absent when auth.test failed.

messages.description: The thread parent followed by its replies, oldest first.

user.description: Raw Slack user ID of the author. Keep for follow-up calls; do not show to the user.

user_display_name.description: Human-readable author name resolved via users.info. Use this in user-facing output. Absent when resolution failed.

is_current_user.description: True when this message was written by the connected account — the requesting user's own words. Absent when the connected identity is unknown.

reply_count.description: On the thread parent: number of replies in the thread.
